https://www.roblox.com/catalog/12664066261/Urban-LEO-Ballistic-vest-White-font

Introducing the Areon Body 2 by Tactical Enhancements—an extraordinary leap forward in surveillance technology. Immerse yourself in peace of mind as you navigate your duties with absolute confidence.
